ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_number" TEXT /* Size number (e.g., 6, 8, 10, etc.) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., Bust, Waist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  "measurement_value" TEXT /* Measurement value corresponding to the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart entry */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, merchandiser, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, update) */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand associated with the product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_line_size_charts" (
  "product_line_size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line size chart entry */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line associated with the size chart */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product line size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product line size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_line_size_charts_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_line_size_charts_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)
